memory.summary: With the project looming, I feel a pull to connect with others during this free afternoon rather than rush into the task alone.
I chose leisure to preserve my mood, but now the afternoon slips away and the project remains untouched.
I reached out to my cohort to keep our bond strong, but I'm already feeling the quiet pressure of the project slipping further away.
I let the moment pass again, prioritizing our bond over the task, and now the project remains untouched while I feel a quiet pressure.

desires: Maintain the current harmony with cohort_3 by avoiding any friction that might arise from pushing for task completion or setting boundaries.
Preserve my energy reserves to ensure I can sleep well tonight and avoid compounding my existing sleep debt tomorrow.
Postpone the inevitable confrontation with the unfinished term project until a later time when the social cost of delaying feels lower.

goals.description: Continue the low-stakes conversation with cohort_3, actively listening and validating their stories to reinforce group cohesion and prevent any sense of isolation.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) dictates that maintaining emotional harmony is paramount. The observation that 'nothing changes' if I let the moment pass confirms my fear of breaking the flow; abandoning this interaction now would fracture the trust I've built. My avoidant conflict style makes me prioritize emotional connection over the trivial urgency of a chore due at 22:00.

goals.description: Maintain the current social block without interruption, deliberately delaying the term project and the trivial chore until tomorrow morning when I can approach them with a rested mind.
goals.rationale: As a deliberate planner with a long horizon, I recognize that switching contexts now to address the 'quick_chore' would cause internal friction and degrade the quality of both the social interaction and future work. Preserving my energy reserves to repay my sleep debt is superior to forcing progress now, especially given my current stress level.

goals.description: Prepare mentally for an early start tomorrow to tackle the term project, ensuring I get a full night's sleep tonight to repay my sleep debt.
goals.rationale: While I am avoiding the immediate stress of the stalled project, my deliberate nature requires a plan for the future. Securing rest is essential for my health and future performance, so I will mentally commit to starting fresh tomorrow rather than forcing a broken effort now.

agent.last_reasoning: Prioritizing cohesion with cohort_3 over the trivial chore (g1). My avoidant style prevents me from interrupting the flow to fix a minor deadline now, which would cause friction. I will defer the task until tomorrow morning when I can approach it with better focus and less stress.

goals.description: Defer deep work on the term project until tomorrow morning.
goals.rationale: Starting now would force me into a high-stress, isolated state that conflicts with my affiliation values. My sleep discipline (8) and need for long-term energy sustainability mean I will tackle this later when I am rested, rather than burning out today.
